description_long: This is a single athletic shoe designed for urban or outdoor use, featuring a predominantly gray upper with black and white accents and a touch of orange on the tongue. The shoe has a rugged, multi-material construction, including a synthetic mesh upper for breathability, reinforced toe cap for protection, and a thick, textured rubber sole for traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black and gray patterned laces, and the collar is padded for comfort. Subtle branding and design elements are visible on the side and tongue, with a logo in orange. The outsole appears to have a durable tread suitable for varied surfaces, and the overall build suggests a focus on both comfort and durability. The shoe shows some signs of use, particularly on the sole and toe area, but remains structurally intact.
description: A gray athletic shoe with black, white, and orange accents, featuring a rugged sole and standard criss-cross lacing. The shoe is lightly used and designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gray upper, black heel, white midsole, and patterned laces, with visible branding and reinforced toe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded black toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and orange logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color scheme, mesh panels, and branding details, with the sole's thickness visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, heel counter, and the back portion of the sole.
